note: Sounds good. Exact plan: I'll add 'dry_run = params.pop("dry_run", False)' near the existing 'save_all = params.pop("save_all", None)' line (~line 2546, well after the docstring/your backup code at the top of the body). I won't touch the top of the body where your backup-copy logic lives. Tests: I'll add new test methods (test_save_dry_run_*) appended to Tests/test_image.py, not touching existing tests. This should merge cleanly.
